channel.title: Devops on KasdevTech

item.title: Jaeger adopts OpenTelemetry at its core to solve the AI agent observability gap - The New Stack: Platform Engineering Guide
item.description: Practical summary of the latest updates around Jaeger adopts OpenTelemetry at its core to solve the AI agent observability gap - The New Stack, with implications for engineering teams.

item.title: Actions workflows are limited to 50 reruns: Platform Engineering Guide

item.title: Organization Firewall Settings for Copilot Cloud Agent
item.description: Copilot cloud agent includes a built-in agent firewall to control Copilot's internet access and help protect against prompt injection and data exfiltration. The post discusses how to configure this feature at the organization level.
